summary: Backend X3 Badge API Fields Verification Complete - All 13 tests PASSED

user_predictions_is_special_multiplier.description: GET /api/predictions/user/{userId}/{matchdayId} returns is_special and multiplier fields
user_predictions_is_special_multiplier.evidence: G17: Inter vs Roma shows is_special=True, multiplier=3.0; Milan vs Napoli shows is_special=False, multiplier=1.0

live_endpoint_is_special_multiplier.description: GET /api/live/{matchday_id} returns is_special and multiplier for each match
live_endpoint_is_special_multiplier.evidence: G17: Inter vs Roma shows is_special=True, multiplier=3.0; Milan vs Napoli shows is_special=False, multiplier=1.0

home_endpoint_live_section.description: GET /api/home returns live matchday info with total_provisional when LIVE
home_endpoint_live_section.evidence: Endpoint accessible, live=None when no LIVE matchday (expected behavior)

fixtures_endpoint_special_matches.description: GET /api/leagues/{league_id}/fixtures returns is_special and multiplier for special matches
fixtures_endpoint_special_matches.evidence: G17 Inter vs Roma: is_special=True, multiplier=3.0; G18 Milan vs Napoli: is_special=True, multiplier=3.0

NOTE: Special matches correctly show is_special=True, multiplier=3.0
